steward_labor_shift.title: Labor shift
steward_labor_shift.dialog: My liege, industrial shortfalls are biting. Permit me to reassign a share of idle hands toward the starving workshops.

steward_role_reshuffle.title: Role reshuffle
steward_role_reshuffle.dialog: The role mix no longer matches the quotas you set. A controlled reform will sting, but inefficiency will sting more.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: Full role reform in one sector

steward_granary_draft.title: Granary draft
steward_granary_draft.dialog: Storehouses sit half-empty while fields and mills wait on hands. A short draft into primary production will refill the stockpile.
